summary: Contract drift auto-repaired via Re-Render Loop (1 iteration); one non-fragment-fixable infobox-metadata note remains for manual review.

repaired.detail: Renamed forbidden heading '#### 7.2.2 Login Rate Limiting' -> '#### 7.2.2 MFA / TOTP' to match auth-mechanism decomposition and Controls-covered link.
Resolved by the same heading rename; '7.2.2 MFA / TOTP' subsection now matches the Controls-covered reference.

manual_review_items.issue: infobox is missing required field(s): license, repository; optional fields missing: author, homepage, runtime, tags.
manual_review_items.remediation: Add a top-level project: block to threat-model.yaml (license, repository, ...) or ensure REPO_ROOT manifests + LICENSE are present; _read_project_manifest() picks them up on the next full/incremental run. Not fragment-fixable in --rerender.
